location_on Brandon Hundt

Civically-minded Product Designer, making the complex simple

Portfolio Posts

  • Dovetail from PRX

    I lead the product direction and design of Dovetail from PRX, an enterprise level podcast publishing platform, including the Dovetail marketing website.

  • PRX Unveils Dovetail’s Improved Podcast Publishing Interface

    I redesigned Dovetail's podcast publishing workflow to be more intuitive while leveraging the design system established in Dovetail's Inventory application.

  • Introducing Inventory Management in Dovetail from PRX

    Part of human centered design is to meet the needs of a user group and hope it scales, designing the inventory system in this way has lead to a lot of success of the platform, as I wrote in this post.

  • PMI Public Media Infrastructure Logo

    Designed the initial brand for the new PMI, a non-profit funding digital public media infrastructure. Client called it 'connection in the valley' and wanted a simple text based, metallic look.

  • PRX Annual Report 2025

    A single page experience leveraging bold colors and inline audio to tell the story of PRX's fiscal year. I designed the report and did the bulk of the development work.

  • PRX Annual Report 2024

    Led design and development on the 2024 edition of the Annual Report. It focuses on photography, color, and typography to tell PRX's story for the year.

  • PRX Annual Report 2023

    The PRX Resource Development team wanted an experience around the theme of 'Choose your own Adventure'. I led a design process to flesh out the concept and designed style tiles off the theme before development.

  • A whole new [the]world[.org]

    Redesigned the website for The World, a public media broadcast program, around a privacy-focused point of view in the hopes of a sustainable public media digital model.

  • Seal Scroller Interactive Story

    Led a human centered design process to develop interactive ideas based on Carolyn Beeler's reporting trip for The World to Antarctica. I designed this interactive that focuses on seals as their experiences as they dive deeper in the cold ocean.

  • Five features of PRX Metrics we want you to know about

    While I did not design the Metrics app within Dovetail, I did get a chance to write about it for the PRX blog.

  • 10 Minnesota city flags, ranked from worst to absolute worst (and one that's alright)

    An article I was commissioned to write for City Pages, leading to me entering an entry into the Rochester, MN flag contest.

  • Minneapolis' love/hate relationship with the skyway, and how to make it suck a lot less (City Pages Version)

    The version City Pages, RIP, posted of my Minneapolis skyway map and signage concepts.

  • Lessons from New Zealand’s disappointing (and now complete) flag referendum

    The final installment in a series I wrote for PRI on the New Zealand flag referendum.

  • It's down to four. A New Zealand panel unveils alternate flag options, to a largely negative reaction.

    The second installment in a series I wrote for PRI on the New Zealand flag referendum.

  • New Zealand is set to fly a new flag. Check out some of the proposals.

    The first installment in a series I was asked to write for PRI on the New Zealand flag referendum.

Civic-Minded Designs

  • Illinois Flag Commission Consultation

    I was part of a trio of advisors from NAVA to the Illinois Legislature in their attempt to change the Illinois flag. See Page 45 of report for contributions.

  • Minnesota State Flag

    My concept for a new flag of Minnesota was selected as a finalist by the State Emblems Redesign Commission. Here I attempt to answer a lot of questions about the flag that became affectionately known as Starflake.

  • Minneapolis Skyway Map, latest version

    The latest version of my Massimo Vignelli inspired Skyway map of Minneapolis.

  • The flag that almost won, Rochester, MN City Flag

    This flag won round 1 of the Rochester flag contest, a contest I entered after panning their current flag in City Pages.

  • Minneapolis City Flag concept after George Floyd

    This is my concept for a new flag for the city of Minneapolis, and some of my most meaningful work.

I'm Brandon and I live in the Twin Cities of Minnesota. You'll typically find me exploring the intersection of design, geography, and sports. In other words, I like flags and maps.

I am a strategic human-centered designer who seeks clarity in complex environments. My philosophy is deeply rooted in human-centered design principles, emphasizing empathy and user-centric solutions.

During the weekday, I'm the Director of Technical Product Management for PRX, working on PRX Dovetail and the website for The World from PRX. I have written for PRI.org and City Pages (RIP).

Follow me on BlueSky or LinkedIn.

  • Blog

©2026 Brandon Hundt
